title: M.A Jobs 2026 – Executive, Jr. Executiveand More
org: Sr. Manager (IT), Executive (Corporate Communication), Legal Expert, Executive (Official Language), Jr. Executive (HR)
applyMode: Offline only - Hard Copy via Speed Post / Courier only
shortInfo: AWEIL Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 09 Executive, Jr. Executiveand More vacancies across India. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E, LLB, M.A, MCA Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 27-05-2026, and closes on 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through AWEIL website, aweil.in.

basic_details.job_title: AWEIL Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 09 Executive, Jr. Executiveand More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Sr. Manager (IT), Executive (Corporate Communication), Legal Expert, Executive (Official Language), Jr. Executive (HR)
basic_details.application_mode: Offline only - Hard Copy via Speed Post / Courier only
basic_details.short_information: AWEIL Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 09 Executive, Jr. Executiveand More vacancies across India. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E, LLB, M.A, MCA Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 27-05-2026, and closes on 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through AWEIL website, aweil.in.

application_fee.details: Selection for all posts will be based on shortlisting from applications received, followed by a Personal Interview conducted by a duly constituted selection committee. There is no written examination. Shortlisting criteria may be enhanced by the Competent Authority if a large number of candidates fulfil the eligibility criteria. The decision of AWEIL on all matters related to eligibility, shortlisting and selection shall be final and binding.

age_limit.details: The upper age limit varies by post and is calculated as on 15-06-2026. No lower age limit has been specified. Age relaxation for reserved categories (OBC/SC/ST/PwD/Ex-Servicemen) shall be as per Government of India rules.

qualification.details: All candidates must be Indian citizens. Eligibility conditions including educational qualification, experience and age limit differ by post as given below. All age limits are as on the last date of advertisement i.e. 15-06-2026.

salary_details.salary: Rs. 60,000/- to Rs. 1,10,000/- per month (consolidated, post-wise) with 10% annual enhancement

how_to_apply: Completed application form in prescribed format with passport photograph (4.4 cm x 5.8 cm) affixed at designated space and second photograph attached (not pasted)
Self-attested copy of age proof - Birth Certificate or 10th Class Certificate
Self-attested copies of all educational qualification certificates and mark sheets (Graduation level onwards)
Self-attested copies of all experience certificates and documentary proof of experience
Self-attested copy of Bar Council Registration Certificate (for Legal Expert post)
Self-attested copy of caste certificate in prescribed format (for OBC candidates applying for Jr. Executive HR)
Aadhar Card Number and PAN Number details (mandatory in application form)
No Objection Certificate from current employer (for Govt./PSU employees - mandatory at interview stage)
important_instructions: The appointment is purely temporary and on contract basis - it does not confer any right or claim of extension or absorption in AWEIL.

The contract can be terminated by AWEIL by giving 1 month's notice or payment of 1 month's salary in lieu thereof. Candidates wishing to leave must give 3 months' notice or pay 3 months' salary in lieu.
Selected candidates will be required to sign a contractual agreement in the prescribed format.

Candidates currently serving in Govt./Quasi-Govt./PSU must seek prior NOC from their employer before applying and must submit it at the time of interview - failure to do so will result in cancellation of candidature.
Candidates from Govt./PSU/private entities who are finally selected must produce the acceptance of their resignation from their last employer before joining AWEIL.

For candidates selected from the private sector, appointment is effective only after verification of Character and Antecedents from the concerned District Authority (applicable for Executive Corporate Communication post).

Any misrepresentation, suppression of facts, use of fraudulent documents or impersonation at any stage will result in permanent debarment and/or legal/criminal prosecution, and dismissal if discovered after joining.
AWEIL reserves the right to reject any application or candidature at any stage without assigning any reason. Decision of AWEIL in all matters related to recruitment shall be final and binding.

Applications not in prescribed format, incomplete, without required attested certificates, received after 15-06-2026, or not routed through the present employer (for Govt./PSU employees) will be summarily rejected.
New Labour Codes will be applicable to all newly engaged contract employees.
AWEIL will not be responsible for any delay in receipt or loss of applications in postal transit.
No correspondence will be entertained regarding shortlisting, interview schedule or selection decisions.

click_here.text: Download AWEIL Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDFs

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for AWEIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of offline applications is June 15, 2026.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in AWEIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 09 vacancies have been announced across multiple posts including Legal Expert, Executive, and Sr. Manager.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for AWEIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply offline through hard copy sent via Speed Post or Courier only.

faq.question: What is the salary offered under AWEIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The monthly consolidated salary ranges from ₹60,000 to ₹1,10,000, depending on the post, with a 10% annual increment.

faq.question: What is the selection process for AWEIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes:Shortlisting based on qualifications and experiencePersonal Interview

faq.question: What is the age limit for AWEIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit varies by post:35 years for Executive & Jr. Executive posts45 years for Sr. Manager, Legal Expert, and Official Language posts

faq.question: What is the duration of the contract in AWEIL jobs?
faq.answer: The contract is initially for 1 year (2 years for Sr. Manager IT), extendable up to 4 years based on performance.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for AWEIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category.
